user.title: WashWise
user.description: Set up a wash advisor that decides whether you can wash a surface based on weather forecast data.

data_description.weather_entities: Pick one or more HA weather entities. The first available source in this ordered list is used; the next one is tried only if the previous one is unavailable.
data_description.name: Friendly name for this WashWise instance. Used to prefix every entity created by this entry.
data_description.category: What you are washing. Each category ships with sensible default thresholds and a default icon. Pick Custom to start from neutral defaults.
data_description.customize_thresholds: Turn on to override the category defaults on the next screen. Leave off to use the preset values for the chosen category.

thresholds.title: Custom thresholds
thresholds.description: Override the defaults that ship with the chosen category. These values control which forecast days block a wash and how the score is computed.

data_description.days: How many forecast days to look ahead, including today. Larger horizons catch more weather but produce more conservative verdicts.
data_description.precip_threshold_mm: Total precipitation per day above this value blocks the wash. Lower values (0.1) are stricter, higher values (1.0) tolerate light drizzle.
data_description.freeze_check: When on, a forecast day whose temperature crosses 0 °C blocks the wash to avoid freezing the wash water on the surface.
data_description.forecast_type: Daily uses one entry per day; Hourly aggregates the next N×24 hourly entries. Hourly is more accurate but requires the source to expose hourly data.
data_description.bad_conditions: Weather condition codes that block washing when they appear in the forecast or as the current condition.
data_description.precip_weight: How much rain in the forecast subtracts from the 0–100 score. Higher value penalizes rainy days more aggressively.
data_description.freeze_weight: How much a freezing day subtracts from the 0–100 score. Set to 0 to ignore freeze in scoring while still blocking the verdict.
data_description.condition_weight: How much bad weather conditions (storms, hail, snow) subtract from the 0–100 score. Severity is per-condition.

irrigation.title: Irrigation settings
irrigation.description: Configure the rain gauge and irrigation program switch for the Garden Irrigation advisor.

data_description.rain_gauge_entity: A sensor entity that reports measured rainfall in mm (e.g. from a weather station pluviometer). Leave empty to use forecast-only suppression.
data_description.rain_gauge_threshold_mm: When the rain gauge reads at or above this value the irrigation program is suppressed automatically.
data_description.irrigation_switch_entity: The switch, input_boolean, or automation that starts your irrigation program. WashWise will turn it off when rain suppresses irrigation and back on when conditions clear.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure WashWise
reconfigure.description: Change the weather sources, name, category, or threshold customization for this instance.

data_description.weather_entities: Pick one or more HA weather entities. The first available source in this ordered list is used; the next one is tried only if the previous one is unavailable.
data_description.name: Friendly name for this WashWise instance. Used to prefix every entity created by this entry.
data_description.category: What you are washing. Each category ships with sensible default thresholds and a default icon. Pick Custom to start from neutral defaults.
data_description.customize_thresholds: Turn on to override the category defaults on the next screen. Leave off to use the preset values for the chosen category.

error.no_weather_entity: Select at least one weather source.
error.weather_unavailable: All selected weather sources are currently unavailable.
error.duplicate_name: A WashWise instance with this name already exists.
error.invalid_category: The selected category is not valid.

providers.title: Weather sources
providers.description: Add, remove, or reorder the weather entities used as forecast sources.

data_description.weather_entities: Order matters. The first available entity in this list is used; the next one is tried only if the previous one is unavailable.

thresholds.title: Thresholds
thresholds.description: Override the defaults that ship with the chosen category.

data_description.days: How many forecast days to look ahead, including today.
data_description.precip_threshold_mm: Total precipitation per day above this value blocks the wash.
data_description.freeze_check: When on, a forecast day whose temperature crosses 0 °C blocks the wash.
data_description.forecast_type: Daily uses one entry per day; Hourly aggregates hourly entries when supported.

scoring.title: Scoring weights
scoring.description: Tune how the 0–100 score is computed. Weights do not need to sum to 100 — they are applied independently per day.

data_description.precip_weight: How much rain in the forecast subtracts from the score.
data_description.freeze_weight: How much a freezing day subtracts from the score.
data_description.condition_weight: How much bad weather conditions subtract from the score.

conditions.title: Blocking conditions
conditions.description: Pick which HA weather condition codes should block a wash.

data_description.bad_conditions: When any of these conditions appears as the current condition or in a forecast day, the verdict is blocked.

data_description.snooze_default_hours: Default duration applied when the snooze service is called without an explicit duration.
data_description.temperature_unit: Override the unit used to interpret forecast temperatures. Auto reads it from the source weather entity (recommended). Pick Celsius / Fahrenheit / Kelvin only when a provider's metadata is wrong or missing.

irrigation.title: Irrigation settings
irrigation.description: Configure the rain gauge sensor and irrigation program switch.

data_description.rain_gauge_entity: A sensor entity reporting measured rainfall in mm. Leave empty to rely on forecast only.
data_description.rain_gauge_threshold_mm: Measured rain at or above this value suppresses irrigation automatically.
data_description.irrigation_switch_entity: The switch or automation that starts your irrigation program. WashWise turns it off when suppressed and back on when conditions clear.

mark_washed.name: Mark as washed
mark_washed.description: Append a wash entry to the wash log for the selected WashWise instance.

timestamp.name: Timestamp
timestamp.description: When the wash happened. Defaults to now.

snooze.name: Snooze
snooze.description: Pause WashWise verdicts for a number of hours. Defaults to 24 hours if not specified.

hours.name: Hours
hours.description: How many hours to snooze (minimum 1). Defaults to 24.

set_irrigation_switch.name: Set irrigation switch
set_irrigation_switch.description: Manually override the irrigation program switch state.

entry_id.name: Configuration
entry_id.description: WashWise garden_irrigation configuration entry to target.

state.name: State
state.description: Turn the irrigation switch on or off.
